description: Expected doc updates for v2.5.0 platform modernization release

expected_doc_updates.what_changes: Replace PayPal references with Stripe; update paypalSubscriptionId to external_subscription_id
Remove legacy_uid from auth response examples (deprecated in PLAT-2026)
Remove legacy_uid claim from JWT payload table (PLAT-2026)
Update: legacy_uid removed; users may need to re-authenticate if integrations rely on that claim
Replace PayPal with Stripe; update paypalSubscriptionId to external_subscription_id
New section: real-time WebSocket notifications now available (replaces polling)
